The multi-timeframe VWAP hierarchy is gold. Most traders treat VWAP as simple support/resistance, but your explanation of how institutions use it as an execution benchmark completely changes the game.

The bandwalk pattern and false breakout recognition are exactly what separates consistent traders from the rest. Your coverage of when VWAP stops working (low volume, gaps) shows real trading experience.

One natural complement to this analysis is seeing the actual order flow during these VWAP interactions – that's where institutional intent becomes obvious. ATAS specializes in exactly that visualization.
